title: Marinad Totems
description: Marinad Totems is a resource pack for Minecraft created for the Marinad.Online server. This pack features a unique variety of totem textures that have been carefully designed to enhance the gameplay experience and add to the atmosphere of the game.
body:
## Description
"Marinad Totems is a resource pack for Minecraft, created for and not limited to the Marinad.Online server. This pack features a unique variety of totem textures that have been carefully crafted to improve gameplay and add atmosphere to the game.

In this resource pack you will find different variations of totems, each with its own unique texture and design. Some of them include totems in the shape of different animals and characters.

This resource pack has been developed for Minecraft version 1.20.1, but may also be compatible with other versions of the game. It offers 16x textures, which makes it ideal for most computers without any noticeable performance loss.

## For the pack to work correctly you need to install mods

На Fabric:
[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions#all-versions)  

На Forge:
[Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
